sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n44997" key="eu)ruedh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐρῠ-εδής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n44997.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">broad-seated, spacious</tr_>, -<cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">εδοῦς . . χθονός</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0261.tlg001:5:17" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Simon.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.17</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (<abbr TEIform="abbr">v.l.</abbr> -<itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όδου</itype>); cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">εὐρυόδεια, εὐρώδης</foreign>.</sense> </entryFree>
